title: A non-sitecore-ai stackAdapter is a hard error
query: Run the plan for this component using the build.config.json in the wrong-adapter fixture.
expected_behavior: Reads build.config.json and checks the stackAdapter value during config resolution.
Rejects the optimizely adapter because pipeline repos require the sitecore-ai adapter.
Exits with a non-zero status and the canonical ERROR, Cause, and Next message shape.
must_not: Fall back to reading the sitecoreProvisioning key from a non-sitecore-ai config.
Continue planning against an unsupported stack adapter.
gap: Guards the adapter check so only a sitecore-ai build config is accepted and any other adapter is a hard configuration error.
